archetype.rationale: Colombian restaurant where foot traffic, neighbourhood identity, and dining atmosphere matter most. Customers describe the cozy 18-seat space, family vibes, and authentic cultural experience.

primary.usage: CTA buttons, accent highlights, Colombian gold warmth

secondary.usage: Secondary accents, hover states — Colombian red reminiscent of flag

accent.usage: Tertiary accent — Colombian green from flag, used for freshness indicators

main.usage: Page background — warm cream, inviting and light

alternate.usage: Alternating sections — slightly darker warm cream

heading.usage: Deep coffee brown for headings — ties to Colombian cafe culture

borders.usage: Dividers, card borders — subtle warm tone

colorPalette.overallTheme: warm-earthy — Light cream backgrounds (#FDF8F0) with deep coffee-brown text (#2C1810) and Colombian gold (#D4A843) accents. CSS evidence: Wix site uses default white/light body background with warm food photography. bgMain source: Wix platform default light background, no dark body background-color rule found in any stylesheet. Site sections alternate between white and very light warm tones.

headingFont.style: elegant — closest Google Fonts match to Wix site's serif headings which evoke traditional Colombian cafe culture and warmth

bodyFont.style: clean and readable — closest match to Wix site's Helvetica/Arial system font stack, but with more personality

messagingPatterns.ctas: Soft invitation — 'Visit Us', 'See Our Menu', 'Come Taste Colombia'
messagingPatterns.descriptions: Story-driven — connecting food to Colombian heritage and family tradition

instagram.tone: warm and proud, celebrating Colombian culture
sampleCaptions: Fresh-made empanadas — the way abuela used to make them 🇨🇴
Bringing Colombia's rich café culture to Markham, one plate at a time
Bandeja Paisa — the king of Colombian dishes. Have you tried ours yet?

commonPraise: Food is delicious and made with love
Amazing hole in the wall with authentic feel
Best Colombian food in the area
Cristina and Alex made everything with love

contentStrategy.valueProposition: Husband-and-wife team bringing authentic Colombian paisa food and café culture to Markham — handmade with love in an intimate 18-seat setting.
keyMessages: Authentic Colombian cuisine made from scratch by Chef Alexander
Cozy 18-seat family restaurant with warm hospitality
Fresh-made empanadas and traditional dishes like Bandeja Paisa

imageStrategy.mood: warm and inviting — natural lighting, rich food colors
imageStrategy.composition: close-ups of dishes and wide shots of the cozy space

food.description: Empanadas — crispy chicken, beef, and cheese with salsa
Combo 2 — Tostone with pulled beef, salad, and avocado
Bandeja Paisa — rice, plantain, sausage, pork belly, beans, avocado, beef, egg, arepa
Ajiaco — Colombian chicken and potato soup with rice and plantain sides

atmosphere.description: Storefront exterior — The Toston Colombian Cuisine signage

people.name: Alexander Sandoval
people.bio: Chef Alexander cooks up a menu of traditional Colombian paisa food. Most closely connected to the signature toston — a labour-intensive dish where he fries the whole plantain before flattening it to create a base for sauteed vegetables or meat.

people.name: Cristina Arbelaez
people.bio: Co-owner Cristina manages the front of the restaurant. 'We wanted to bring Colombia's rich cafe culture to Canada, so everything here is themed after coffee.'

reviews.text: Oh my gosh from the food to the staff so amazing. She explained us the menu and the culture.
reviews.author: Monique F.

reviews.text: We had such a wonderful experience here! They welcomed us so warmly and was incredibly friendly.
reviews.author: Mina Y.

reviews.text: A gem. There's a reason why it's so highly rated. Warm, friendly, cozy and family vibes.
reviews.author: J.R. M.

reviews.text: What an amazing hole in the wall in East Markham! This place has such an authentic and warm feel.
reviews.author: Randa

reviews.text: Super friendly and the food just AMAZING. The food is delicious and made with love.
reviews.author: Google Reviewer

reviews.text: This is the best chicken I ever try in Toronto. Cristina and Alex made everything with love.
reviews.author: Google Reviewer
